subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-07-10 in New York
subcodes.first_line: This evening I wish to explain to you the cause of the people's veiling from the sacred Manifestations of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امشب میخواهم از برای شما سبب احتجاب ناس را از مظاهر مقدسه الهی بیان کنم این
subcodes.subjects: @essential distinction of Manifestation of God from others, @Christ; Christianity, @outward and inward meanings, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @literal interpretation, @symbolism, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ
